collections.name: str_properties
collections.description: Semantic search over property listings by name, description, amenities, and neighborhood guide for finding similar properties and recommendation matching

collections.name: str_reviews
collections.description: Semantic search over guest reviews and host responses for sentiment analysis, pattern detection, and identifying recurring issues or praise themes
